title: Purple Heart Balloons, 10 Pcs Lavender Light Purple Foil Mylar Heart Shape Balloons 20 Inch Reusable Big Helium Balloon for Women Birthday Valentine's Day Decorations Bridal Shower Engagement
features: Purple Heart Balloon: You will receive 10 pcs 20 inch purple heart shaped foil balloons, 1 pcs Balloon Ribbon and a straw, offering plenty of supplies for your purple birthday decorations needs. These vibrant Lavendar foil balloons will be the perfect complement to your romantic decoration

High-Quality Material: Crafted from premium foil, these vibrant light purple heart shape balloons are essential for your valentines day decorations. Their glossy, heart-shaped form is thick, safe, eco-conscious, resisting cracks and fading to keep your foil heart balloons brilliant. They feature a self-sealing valve for quick inflation and are reusable, perfect for any romantic celebration

Suitable Occasion: These elegant valentines balloons are perfect valentines party decorations and more! The romantic balloons adds a festival touch. Ideal for Anniversary Celebrations, Bridal Showers, Valentine's Day Decorations, Weddings, Birthday Party Decorations, Christmas Halloween and more

Versatile Party Decor: These heart foil ballons are incredibly versatile, perfect for use in balloon bouquets, balloon arches, and as accents for table centerpieces or photo backdrops. Whether you’re decorating for a romantic dinner or a large event, these versatile love balloons will help transform your space into a beautiful, festive environment, making your event even more memorable

Easy to Use & Long-lasting: Inflating these reusable balloons is simple with the included straw. Once inflated, they feature a self-sealing valve that ensures a secure closure without air leaks. These giant heart balloons are designed to last, maintaining their brilliant purple color for up to a month with proper inflation
description: 20-Inch Lavender Purple Heart Foil Balloons - Romance for Special Moments! What's Included: 10 × 20-inch Lavender Purple Heart Balloons 1 × Balloon Ribbon (for hanging) 1 × Inflation Straw Key Benefits: Premium Mylar Material - Thick, eco-friendly foil resists fading and cracking for vibrant color Self-Sealing Valve - Inflate in seconds; automatic leak-proof closure enables reuse 30-Day Durability - Maintains shape and brilliance for weeks when properly inflated Helium/Air Compatible - Floats with helium or stays perfect as wall decor with air How to Use: INFLATE: Insert the included straw into the valve opening. Blow air or helium until the balloon is 80–90% full SEAL: Gently remove the straw—the self-sealing valve closes automatically to lock in air REUSE: Press the valve gently to deflate. Fold flat and store in a cool, dark place for future events Important Notes: Keep away from: Sharp objects, open flames, and direct heat sources Never overinflate - Blow air or helium Fill to 80–90% capacity to prevent bursting Helium Tip: Use helium for floating (lasts 3-5 days). Air-filled balloons last 3-4 weeks Storage: keep in dry conditions below 86°F (30°C) Perfect For: Gender Reveals Anniversary Celebrations Bridal Showers & Wedding Decor Valentine's Day Decorations Birthday Parties, Christmas & Halloween Elevate Your Decor - Lavender Dreams Await!
